name: Hex Drums
explanation: Analog electronic drums in the Simmons SDS-V lineage — every hit is synthesised in real time, not sampled. The signature is the pitch-swept 'pew' tom: a sine whose pitch drops sharply at the attack, plus a noisy click, with kick, snare and hat voices. A MIDI note selects a voice (note % 6) and fires it into an 8-slot pool. Controls: Pitch (tuning), Sweep (the pitch-drop depth), Decay, Noise (click/snap), Tone and Level.
